content: The tree must handle inverted pairs where the user turn is the substantive one and the agent turn is just acknowledgement (e.g. a 'spec drop' where user provides a complete design document). The current design assumes agent proposes / user confirms, but this pattern also occurs in reverse. A single user turn can contain multiple distinct decisions — the tree needs to handle multi-signal pairs.

provenance.raw_agent: seq 10 — a single user turn containing a complete design document. That's not really a 'pair' in the ratification sense, it's a spec drop. The tree needs to handle the case where the user turn is the substantive one and the agent turn is just acknowledgement.
